title: neottia morrisonicola
intro: Neottia morrisonicola, also known as the Taiwan ghost orchid, is a species of orchid endemic to Taiwan. It is a type of epiphytic orchid, which means it grows on other plants for support. The medicinal properties of Neottia morrisonicola include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant are said to include reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and relief from respiratory issues, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions.
